name: Cinnamon-Chocolate Pizzelles
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup margarine or butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and cinnamon.
2. Beat the eggs in a small mixer bowl with a mixer on high speed until thick and lemon-colored (about 4 minutes).
3. Gradually beat in sugar on medium speed.
4. Beat in margarine and vanilla.
5. Add the flour mixture; beat on low speed until combined.
6. Heat the pizzelle iron according to the manufacturer's directions.
7. Place a slightly rounded tablespoon of batter slightly off-center toward the back of the grid.
8. Bake according to the manufacturer's directions.
9. Turn the wafers out onto paper towels to cool.
Makes 18 (34 pizzelles; 30 per pound, trimmed).
